message:
test(engine): expand test suites for iteration lowering and new modules

Comprehensive test additions across 9 test files:

claim_entitlement.rs (+1089 lines): expanded entitlement algebra tests
covering new edge cases, composition rules, and boundary conditions

parser_frontier_harness.rs (+743 lines): for-in/for-of parse scenarios,
tagged template rejection cases, template literal parsing, and new
expression handling — validates the parser produces correct AST nodes
for all iteration-related syntax

supremacy_cell_matrix.rs (+918 lines): expanded matrix coverage for
the supremacy cell certification system

lowering_pipeline_integration.rs (+317 lines): end-to-end tests for
for-in and for-of lowering paths verifying correct IR1 op sequences
(ForInInit/ForInNext/StoreBinding/Pop/Jump and ForOfInit/ForOfNext/
StoreBinding/Pop/IteratorClose), break/continue label wiring, and
nested loop interactions

module_cache_integration.rs (+6/-4): minor import adjustments for
renamed/new adaptive S3-FIFO types

New test files:
- iterable_workload_verification.rs (+1152 lines): verifies that
  for-in/for-of workloads produce correct iteration traces
- iterator_protocol_integration.rs (+914 lines): integration tests
  for the iterator protocol module
- timescale_separation_certificate_integration.rs (+807 lines):
  integration tests for timescale separation certification
- universal_dominance_ratchet_integration.rs (+1178 lines):
  integration tests for the universal dominance ratchet

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
